Notice Of Motion And Mootion To Compel Further Responses To 1) Request For Production Of Documents; Rrequest For Sanctions In Favor Of Pltf And Against Defts
Off Calendar Dec-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. HAROLD M. JAFFE, TEL. NO. (510) 452-2610 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. J. MICHAEL ANTHONY, TEL. NO. 485-2200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT KAHN & ASSOCIATES' Motion To Compel Further Responses To 1) Request For Production Of Documents (Set 1) and Request For Sanctions In Favor Of Plaintiff And Against Defendants and their Attorney of record, jointly and severally is Granted and to be provided by December 16, 2011. No opposition filed. Although plaintiff's reply memorandum refers to opposition papers filed by defendants, the court's own records do not show that any opposition was filed, nor did department 302 receive courtesy copies of any opposition papers. Judge Kahn discloses that he is not related to the plaintiff or its principals. Sanction is granted in the amount of $740.00. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =302/HEK
